Uses of Class
org.vorpal.blade.framework.logging.LogParameters

Packages that use LogParameters
org.vorpal.blade.framework.config Use the SettingsManager Generics class to dynamically read and write configuration files. 
org.vorpal.blade.framework.logging Creates a custom "java.util.logging" logger with specific features for tracing SIP callflows.

 LogParameters LogParameters.setConfigurationLoggingLevel(LogParameters.LoggingLevel configurationLoggingLevel)
           
 LogParameters LogParameters.setDirectory(String directory)
           
 LogParameters LogParameters.setFileCount(Integer fileCount)

 LogParameters LogParameters.setUseParentLogging(Boolean useParentLogging)
          If true, statements will appear in the standard WebLogic log files.
